title: Export Archived History & Items
excerpt:
It’d be great if we could export archived items as a csv file, similar to the board exports. 
We use the archive to find any completed actions or items that we wanted to feedback on or find more information about, and th…

posts.author: wineisallforme (Paul Beal)
posts.cookedHtml:
It’d be great if we could export archived items as a csv file, similar to the board exports.

We use the archive to find any completed actions or items that we wanted to feedback on or find more information about, and the only way to search through this is to use the search query section at the top. Other than this there’s no way of seeing what actions have been taken.

The data is already there and being stored, so to be able to export this would make searching through it a lot easier.

Thanks!

posts.author: cassady (Cassady)
posts.cookedHtml:
Agreed! Reports on accomplishments (done tasks) that automatically archive would be good. This would make a robust report to leadership.

Would be nice to be able to use the same filters and everything that are used on them when they are in boards (by person/ date/ etc)

posts.author: Productionmanager (Andrew Jensen)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed! Trying to remember the name you gave an item 6 months ago is a little absurd.

posts.author: isantiagoescobar (isantiagoescobar)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi! Did any of you get an answer or found out a solution for this?

posts.author: debsherman25 (Deb Sherman)
posts.cookedHtml: I would agree. It would be nice to be able to export from Archive.

posts.author: hbristol (Heather Bristol)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed this would be a helpful feature, especially for enterprise use where audit trail becomes so important.
